mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_reservation ( cl_order_id, product_id, lot_no, reserved_qty, reserved_at, client_id, manager, detail_id ) VALUES ( #{clOrderId}, #{productId}, #{lotNo}, #{reservedQty}, NOW(), #{clientId}, #{manager}, #{detailId} )
mapper.select: SELECT sr.cl_order_id, sr.product_id, sr.lot_no, sr.reserved_qty, sr.detail_id, sr.manager, co.client_id FROM stock_reservation sr JOIN client_order co ON sr.cl_order_id = co.cl_order_id WHERE sr.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId}

SELECT pi.product_id, pi.lot_no, pi.inbound_qty, IFNULL(po.total_outbound_qty, 0) AS total_outbound_qty, IFNULL(sr.total_reserved_qty, 0) AS reserved_qty, (pi.inbound_qty - IFNULL(po.total_outbound_qty, 0) - IFNULL(sr.total_reserved_qty, 0)) AS available_qty, pi.expire_date FROM product_inbound pi LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, lot_no, SUM(outbound_qty) AS total_outbound_qty FROM product_outbound GROUP BY product_id, lot_no ) po ON pi.product_id = po.product_id AND pi.lot_no = po.lot_no LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, lot_no, SUM(reserved_qty) AS total_reserved_qty FROM stock_reservation GROUP BY product_id, lot_no ) sr ON pi.product_id = sr.product_id AND pi.lot_no = sr.lot_no WHERE pi.product_id = #{productId} HAVING available_qty > 0 ORDER BY pi.expire_date ASC

SELECT sr.lot_no AS lotNo, p.product_name AS productName, sr.cl_order_id AS clOrderId, c.client_name AS clientName, sr.reserved_qty AS reservedQty, DATE_FORMAT(sr.reserved_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reservedAt, DATE_FORMAT(sr.reserved_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS reservedAtFormatted, DATE_FORMAT(pi.expire_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS expireDate, /* LOT 현재 재고 = (입고합 - 출고합) */ GREATEST( COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(pi2.inbound_qty) FROM product_inbound pi2 WHERE pi2.product_id = sr.product_id AND pi2.lot_no = sr.lot_no ),0) - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(po2.outbound_qty) FROM product_outbound po2 WHERE po2.product_id = sr.product_id AND po2.lot_no = sr.lot_no ),0), 0 ) AS currentStock, DATE_FORMAT(co.cl_delivery_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS deliveryDate FROM stock_reservation sr JOIN product p ON p.product_id = sr.product_id JOIN client_order co ON co.cl_order_id = sr.cl_order_id JOIN client c ON c.client_id = co.client_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_id, lot_no, MIN(expire_date) AS expire_date FROM product_inbound GROUP BY product_id, lot_no ) pi ON pi.product_id = sr.product_id AND pi.lot_no = sr.lot_no WHERE sr.lot_no = #{lotNo} AND sr.cl_order_id = #{clOrderId} LIMIT 1
